title: Replace start_link with start_supervised in a GenServer test
prompt: A test currently starts a GenServer via `{:ok, pid} = MyApp.Cache.start_link([])`. Rewrite the test in `test/my_app/cache_test.exs` to use ExUnit's `start_supervised!/1` instead, so the GenServer's lifetime is tied to the test supervisor and cannot outlive the test. Use `start_supervised!({MyApp.Cache, []})`.
research_citation: "you might try to start the genserver under the test supervisor so it doesn't outlive the individual test process" — Elixir Forum, CherryPoppins
